'''New Geddes''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Terraforming/Legends|terraformed]] [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Hanoon]], and the site of the [[Terraform Processor]].

==History==
The [[City/Legends|city]] of New Geddes grew out of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] research base on the asteroid Geddes, [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Krant]]. The base was [[Battle of Geddes|raided]] by a small [[Army/Legends|army]] led by the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Echuu Shen-Jon]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] leader [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], and the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Attichitcuk/Legends|Attichitcuk]]. They destroyed a [[Sith temple (Geddes)|Sith Temple]] and recovered the [[Vor'Na'Tu]], an ancient and powerful [[Jedi artifact/Legends|Jedi artifact]]. When Krant was [[Krantian Civil War|liberated]] by Shen-Jon and Organa, the Imperial [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of Krant, [[Yittreas]], retreated to the asteroid.<ref name="GB" />

By [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]],<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the [[Battle of Hanoon]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]].</ref> New Geddes was the location of the main [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] on the [[Terraforming/Legends|terraformed]] [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]], since renamed [[Hanoon]]. The forces of New Geddes consisted of veteran [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] who originally served on [[Krant]].<ref name="GB" />

[[File:Yittreas_fortresses_destroyed.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Moff Yittreas's fortress is destroyed.]]

Moff Yittreas bid his time, slowly terraforming and colonizing Geddes using [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] and strengthened the remainder of the base. [[Standard year/Legends|Years]] later, Organa returned with [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. They [[Battle of Hanoon|destroyed]] the Moff's [[Fortress/Legends|Fortress]], and finally killed him, thus ending the iron-fisted rule of New Geddes.<ref name="GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
New Geddes was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]] for the [[2001]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''.<ref name="GB Guide">[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref> It appeared during the Princess Leia campaign.<ref name="GB" /> The campaign was also included in the game's [[2002]] expansion pack, ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''.
